examiner_note: Nói về sở thích cá nhân và cách nghệ thuật ảnh hưởng đến bạn. Sử dụng 'expressive medium', 'evoke emotions', 'aesthetic appreciation'.

band7.text: Yes, I do. I find art to be a great way to express oneself and convey emotions and ideas. I particularly enjoy paintings and sculptures, and I try to visit art museums whenever I can. It's very relaxing to look at beautiful things.
band7.note: Trả lời mạch lạc, sử dụng từ vựng ổn (express oneself, convey, sculptures).

band8.text: Definitely. I’ve always been drawn to art as an expressive medium. Whether it’s a classical painting or a modern installation, I appreciate the creativity and vision behind the work. It has a unique ability to evoke emotions and broaden one’s perspective.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên (drawn to, expressive medium, installation, evoke, broaden perspective).

band9.text: I’m a fervent admirer of the arts in all their forms. To me, art is the ultimate manifestation of human creativity and a vital tool for social commentary. I find immense satisfaction in exploring the aesthetic and intellectual depths of a well-crafted piece, as it often challenges my preconceptions and enriches my worldview.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng học thuật và triết lý (fervent, manifestation, social commentary, aesthetic, preconceptions, enriches worldview).

v.example: We saw a fascinating modern art installation.
The disease is a manifestation of stress.
We must challenge our preconceptions about other cultures.

advanced_vocab.example: He is a fervent supporter of the environmental movement.

similar_questions: What kind of art do you like?
Is art popular in your country?
